# Evidence Schema

Use this schema for issue reports, investigations, and PRs when a change claims
to fix or improve runtime behavior.

## Required Fields

- build or commit under test
- game version
- mod configuration
- city or scenario description
- exact symptom
- reproduction steps
- observed outcome
- expected outcome
- logs, screenshots, or save references

## Strong Evidence

- points to the exact vanilla system or helper involved
- distinguishes confirmed behavior from inferred behavior
- shows before/after comparison when practical
- states what remains unknown
